anchor.note: Default pinned anchor checked into the repository. It records the Merkle root of the canonical model manifest so PoUW verifiers have a trusted reference without a network round-trip. To anchor on a real chain, publish `root` to your registry contract or a transparency-log signed tree head, then fill in `chain`/`contract`/`tx`/`block` and set `kind` to e.g. `evm-storage-slot`. The PoUW verifier trusts ONLY the `root` field; the other fields are provenance metadata for auditors. Re-anchoring is a deliberate act: re-exporting a different model set changes `root` and MUST be followed by re-publishing the anchor.
